title: peucedanum multivittatum var. dissectum
intro: Peucedanum multivittatum var. dissectum, also known as the dissected multivittatum fern-umbel, is a variety of the Peucedanum multivittatum plant, which is a flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Asian cultures, for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Peucedanum multivittatum var. dissectum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Peucedanum multivittatum var. dissectum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in traditional remedies such as poultices and ointments.
